title: Update: Syracuse police say man suffered laceration, was not stabbed on city’s North Side
summary: Syracuse Police Department issued a correction regarding an incident on the North Side, clarifying that a man sustained a laceration rather than a stab wound. This represents a factual update to initial crime reporting that may affect public safety perception and crime data accuracy for the neighborhood.

political_signal.description: Correction to initial crime report suggests potential issues with incident classification accuracy or initial reporting procedures; relevant to police transparency and data governance standards.

processing_notes: Article is a correction/update; headline vs. URL show conflicting descriptions (stabbed vs. laceration)
No specific location details, dollar amounts, or named individuals (victim/accused) provided in excerpt
Relevant to crime-data quality assurance and public-safety-commission oversight
